scenes.narration: What exactly is a GPU? And why do we need them instead of just using our CPU for everything?
Unlike a CPU, which has a few very fast and complex cores, a GPU has thousands of smaller, simpler cores designed to do math in parallel.
scenes.visual_text:
CPU vs GPU
• Few fast cores
• Thousands of small cores

scenes.narration: This makes them perfect for rendering graphics, and incredibly powerful for training artificial intelligence models.
